projectDescription: A native C# and TypeScript inference engine for running GGUF AI language models on CPU, NVIDIA CUDA, Vulkan, WebGPU, and Apple Metal.
keyFeatures: Multi-backend inference: CPU (AVX2/AVX-512), NVIDIA CUDA, Vulkan (cross-platform GPU), WebGPU (browser/Node.js)
Native C# implementation with zero external dependencies for the core library
LoRA fine-tuning directly on quantized GGUF models with GPU-accelerated AdamW optimizer
LLogos Turbo: 8-12x KV cache compression via Walsh-Hadamard rotation and scalar quantization
GBNF grammar-constrained generation for structured output (JSON, tool calls)
Hybrid GPU/CPU inference to split large models across VRAM and system RAM
Flash attention with paged KV cache and RAM offloading for 200K+ context
Support for 10+ quantization formats: Q8_0, Q4_0, Q4_K, Q5_K, Q6_K, BF16, F16, I2_S (BitNet), TQ1_0, Q1_0 (Bonsai 1-bit)
DaisiChain: layer-wise pipeline parallelism across multiple hosts
WebGPU browser inference via @daisinet/llogos-webgpu npm package (72 automated tests)
publicApiSurface: IComputeBackend — backend-agnostic compute interface (MatMul, RmsNorm, Softmax, SiLU, RoPE, ElementMul, ElementAdd)
ITensor — hardware-independent tensor handle (CopyFrom, CopyTo, Dispose)
GgufFile.Read(stream) — parse GGUF v2/v3 model files
ModelConfig.FromGguf(gguf) — extract model configuration from GGUF metadata
TokenizerFactory.FromGguf(gguf) — build BPE tokenizer from GGUF vocabulary
CpuBackend / CudaBackend / VulkanBackend — concrete backend implementations
LlogosEngine (TypeScript) — WebGPU inference engine for browser and Node.js
LlogosEngine.loadModel(url) — load GGUF model via HTTP with Cache API
